data: Pokémon GO kapalıyken yumurta çatlatmaya devam edin.

Her rütbede ek ödüller kazanabilir ve anında 10 rütbe atlayabilirsiniz.
Bağlantı Şarj Aletiniz dolu. Daha fazla Bağlantı Şarjı alabilmek için mega akınlarda Bağlantı Şarjı kullanın.

Seni görmek ne güzel %PLAYERNAME%! Yakalanacak bir sürü Pokémon’umuz, yapılacak bir dolu araştırmamız var. İşe koyulmayı dört gözle bekliyorum!
Bu yollardan en çok hangisi ilgini çekiyor?
Akın tamamlayarak fazladan 5000 TP kazanmak için bu yolu seçin.
GO Roket Takımı Serserilerinden fazladan Gizemli Bileşen almak için bu yolu seçin.
İyi, süper veya mükemmel atışla Pokémon yakalayarak 1,5× TP kazanmak için bu yolu seçin.
İyi, süper veya mükemmel atışla başarıyla Pokémon yakalayarak fazladan şeker kazanmak için bu yolu seçin.
PokéDurak döndürerek 5× TP kazanmak için bu yolu seçin.
1/2 çatlatma mesafesi bonusu kazanmak için bu yolu seçin.
A gadget that automatically throws Poké Balls and spins PokéStops for you while exploring.

GO Fest 2026: Copenhagen and LEGO Collaboration Timed Research
2 Mayıs 2026’da, yerel saatle 14.00-17.00 arasında geçerli olacak özel bonuslara dilediğiniz yerden hak kazanmanıza olanak tanıyan bir bilet.
23 Mayıs 2026 Cumartesi, yerel saatle 14.00-17.00 arasında geçerli olacak özel bonuslara dilediğiniz yerden hak kazanmanıza olanak tanıyan bir bilet.
Bu bilet özel bonuslara dilediğiniz yerden hak kazanabilmeniz için 2 Mayıs 2026’da otomatik olarak etkinleştirilecek.
Bu bilet özel bonuslara dilediğiniz yerden hak kazanabilmeniz için 23 Mayıs’ta otomatik olarak etkinleştirilecek.
9 Mayıs’ta, yerel saatle 14.00’te başlayacak Lechonk Topluluk Günü özel araştırması Lechonk’un Kokusu Çıktı’ya dilediğiniz yerden katılmanıza olanak tanıyan bir bilet.
16 Mayıs’ta, yerel saatle 14.00’te başlayacak Deino Topluluk Günü Klasik özel araştırması Minik Ama Hiddetli’ye dilediğiniz yerden katılmanıza olanak tanıyan bir bilet.
Bu bilet Lechonk’un Kokusu Çıktı özel araştırmasına dilediğiniz yerden erişebilmeniz için 9 Mayıs’ta otomatik olarak etkinleştirilecek.
Bu bilet Deino Topluluk Günü Klasik özel araştırması Minik Ama Hiddetli’ye dilediğiniz yerden erişebilmeniz için 16 Mayıs’ta otomatik olarak etkinleştirilecek.
Siz keşif yaparken otomatik olarak Poké Topu atan ve PokéDurak döndüren bir aygıt.
Siz keşif yaparken otomatik olarak Poké Topu atan ve PokéDurak döndüren bir aygıt.
Etkinlik süresince 08.00, 12.00 ve 19.00 saatlerinde 5 dakikalığına ilk partner Pokémon’lar ortaya çıkacak!
Okul Vakti geldi! Okul Bölgesinde ilk partner Pokémon’lar ortaya çıkıyor!
24-25 Mayıs tarihleri arasında COEX’te keşfe çıkarak etkinlik temalı Pokémon’larla karşılaşabilir, süreli araştırmayı tamamlayarak Morpeko ile bir karşılaşma kazanabilirsiniz!

Ek ödüller kazanıp fazladan 1000 PokéParanın kilidini açın!

• Fazladan 1000 PokéPara
• 1 Süper Kuluçka Makinesi
• Ve dahası!

• Pawniard, Honedge, Meltan ve diğerleriyle karşılaşmalar!
• Ve dahası!

Pokémon GO kapalıyken otomatik olarak Poké Topu atıp PokéDurak döndürün. Günde bir kere kullanılabilir.
Pokémon GO kapalıyken otomatik olarak Poké Topu atıp PokéDurak döndürün.
Eşya Çantanızı yönetin veya eşya depolama kapasitenizi artırın.
Daha çok toplamak için Hediye açın, PokéDurak ve spor salonu döndürün veya mağazayı ziyaret edin.
Bugün istediğiniz zaman kaldığınız yerden devam edebilirsiniz.
Pokémon’larınızı Profesör Willow’a gönderebilir veya Pokémon deponuzu geliştirebilirsiniz.
Siz keşif yaparken otomatik olarak Poké Topu atan ve PokéDurak döndüren bir aygıt.
Dilediğiniz zaman ayarlarlardaki Ek Cihazlar bölümünden cihazınıza geri dönebilirsiniz.
Cihazınız duraklatılıp Kâşif Aygıtına geçilsin mi?
Kâşif Aygıtı kullanılarak spor salonlarından {0} eşya alındı.
Kâşif Aygıtı kullanılarak spor salonlarından {0} eşya alındı.
Kâşif Aygıtı kullanılarak PokéDuraklardan {0} eşya alındı.
Kâşif Aygıtı kullanılarak PokéDuraklardan {0} eşya alındı.
Kâşif Aygıtının konum erişimine ihtiyacı var.
Kâşif Aygıtının arka planda otomatik olarak Poké Topu atmasına ve PokéDurak döndürmesine izin verin.
3. Konum Erişimine İzin Ver’i Her Zaman olarak ayarlayın.
Keşfe devam etmek için aygıtı açın.
Ek cihazınızla bağlantı kurmak Kâşif Aygıtı oturumunuzu tamamlayacak.
Kâşif Aygıtı etkin. Mevcut cihazı yeniden bağlamak için buraya dokunun.
Eşya Çantası dolu ve Poké Topu yok.
Kâşif Aygıtını duraklatmak istediğinizden emin misiniz?
Doğada daha fazla Lechonk ortaya çıkıyor!
I’m so thrilled to see you, %PLAYERNAME%!
Making new friends, seeing new sights, trying new foods... It’s all so exciting!
And what’s more, the Mythical Pokémon Zeraora is here!
I wonder if it sensed a gathering of strong and powerful Trainers like you and came to see for itself?
Let’s get out there and show it what we can do!
Wait! Hoo! Let me catch my breath... You really took getting out there to heart, haha!
If Zeraora is indeed watching, I think it would be thoroughly impressed by your skill.
In fact, I have a hunch it is closer than we think. I noticed some flashes of light in the distance.
Wherever Zeraora runs, lightning flashes and thunder echoes. Looks like we’re not the only ones getting charged up at GO Fest!
Do you know how Zeraora fights?
It electrifies its claws and tears its opponents apart with them.
Even if they dodge its attack, they’ll be electrocuted by the flying sparks. Watt incredible power! Ahem.
We’d best be prepared for Zeraora.
I’ll collect more information on its whereabouts while you power up your knowledge on Electric-types!
Think fast! What are Electric-type Pokémon’s strengths and weaknesses?
Correct! They are super effective against Flying- and Water-type Pokémon and weak against Ground-types.
You’re quick on your feet, and that will come in handy.
Zeraora runs as fast as lightning strikes, shredding its opponents with its high-voltage claws. It’s speedy, but I have no doubt you can catch it.
Up for some stormchasing? Let’s GO!
Phew! All that exploring really zapped my energy. I could use a break- but you look like you can keep going!
That reminds me- Electricity sparks from the pads on Zeraora’s limbs.
When it unleashes its full power, it becomes incredibly powerful, even among Electric-type Pokémon.
You’ve still got plenty of energy left in you. Let’s see what you’re made of, Trainer!
Trainer, there you are! I ran into Spark and some new friends he made.
Guess what, they saw Zeraora not too far from here!
In fact, there’s an interesting charge in the air. I can feel the hair on my head rising--and it’s not just because of my styling gel, haha!
I wonder if that means we’re close by? Take a look around and see!
Outstanding work, %PLAYERNAME%! You’ve captured lightning in a Poké Ball!
Just look at all that electricity sparking from the pads on Zeraora’s limbs. If I could just measure the voltage... *ZAP*
Whoa! Looks like Zeraora has quite a bit of energy to expend.
I’d love to observe it out on the field. Let’s spend some time getting to know each other!
I’d call this quite the success! Thank you for helping me with my research as always.
And now you have a new, powerful friend to join you on your journey.
You two deserve a round of applause for all of your efforts--perhaps some thunderclaps are in order? Haha!
Anyway, I can’t wait to see how far you’ll go together.
And you know, something tells me we’ve seen just the sparks of Zeraora’s potential... but for now, let’s celebrate!
Making new friends, seeing new sights, trying new foods... All of this is all so exciting!
And even more exciting than that—I’ve heard the Mythical Pokémon Zeraora is in the area!
Maybe it could sense this gathering of strong Trainers like you and came to investigate.
Well, we’d better get out there and show it what we’re made of!
*huff huff* Wait! Let me catch my breath... Phew! You sure took what I said about getting out there to heart, didn’t you?
One thing’s for sure—if Zeraora is watching, it’ll be plenty impressed by your skills!
And on that note, I actually have a hunch it’s closer than we think. I’ve spied a few flashes of light off in the distance.
And wherever Zeraora runs, you get flashes of lightning and the echo of thunder. I guess we’re not the only ones getting charged up!
Here’s a question! Do you know how Zeraora fights? It’s a real shock!
You see, it electrifies its claws and uses them to tear its opponents apart.
Even if they manage to dodge the attack, they’ll still get zapped by the flying sparks. Watt incredible power! Ahem.
In any event, we’d best prepare ourselves.
I’ll try to collect information on its whereabouts while you get out there and power up your knowledge on Electric types.
Think fast—what are the strengths and weaknesses of Electric-type Pokémon?
That’s right! They’re super effective against Water- and Flying-type Pokémon and weak against Ground types.
You’re pretty quick on your feet! That’ll come in handy.
Zeraora runs as fast as lightning strikes. That’s plenty speedy, but I’m sure you’ll be able to catch it.
So, up for some storm chasing? Let’s GO!
Whew! All that exploring really zapped my energy. I could use a break, but you look like you’re bursting with energy!
And speaking of energy, did you know that electricity sparks from the pads on Zeraora’s limbs?
I’m glad I don’t have that power—imagine trying to brush my hair!
What’s say we make use of that energy of yours and see what you’re made of? Go get ’em!
I just ran into Spark and some new friends he made—and guess what? They spotted Zeraora not far from here!
That might explain the unusual charge to the air. I can feel my hair standing on end—and not because of my styling gel, either! Haha!
We must be close. Go take a look around!
Outstanding work, %PLAYERNAME%! You’ve captured lightning in a Poké Ball!
Just look at all those sparks. If I could just measure the voltage... *ZAP*
Whoa! Talk about energy to spare!
I’d love to observe Zeraora out on the field. You should spend some time getting to know each other!
You know what I’d call that? A total success! Thank you for always helping me with my research.
And for your efforts, you’ve got a powerful new friend to join you on your journey.
You both deserve a round of applause for all your efforts. Maybe even a thunderclap! Haha!
Anyway, I can’t wait to see how far you two will go together.
Something tells me we’ve only seen the first sparks of Zeraora’s potential. But for now, we celebrate!

Deino Topluluk Günü Klasik özel araştırması biletini mağazadan alabilirsiniz
Lechonk Topluluk Günü özel araştırması biletini mağazadan alabilirsiniz
Mega Mewtwo X’i takip etmek için bu yolu seçin.
Mega Mewtwo Y’yi takip etmek için bu yolu seçin.
Ah, %PLAYERNAME%! There’s something remarkable I need to share with you.
You may be familiar with Mewtwo - one of the most extraordinary Pokémon ever documented.
Its origins are unlike any other Pokémon I’ve studied, the result of years of genetic research and DNA experimentation by a scientist.
What they created was a Pokémon engineered to battle. The power it carries as a result of that is... well, the data speaks for itself.
My research suggests Mewtwo may be active in the area, and from what I know of it, it won’t settle for just any trainer.
You could be exactly the type of trainer Mewtwo is looking to battle, so stay sharp and keep your Pokémon close!
%PLAYERNAME%,  this may be bigger than Mewtwo alone.
I’ve been tracking some extraordinary readings lately, and I believe it is  Mega Evolved Mewtwo who may be looking for a challenger.
I know you’ve faced tough battles before, but this feels different.
The combination of raw power and psychic intensity in the data I’m seeing warrants serious preparation.
I don’t want to alarm you, but I also don’t want you walking in underprepared.
Start getting your team ready, %PLAYERNAME%! This is exactly the kind of encounter that gets a Pokémon Professor’s heart racing!
%PLAYERNAME% before you head into battle, I want you to take some time to explore Mega Evolutions.
Every Mega Evolution is different, and the better informed you are, the stronger you’ll be when you face Mega Evolved Mewtwo.
Take a look at the Mega Evolved Pokémon out there. What makes each one distinct? What might take you by surprise?
Mega Evolved Mewtwo is going to demand your very best, so now is the perfect time to brush up and go in with fresh eyes.
Explore, reflect, and let what you discover guide you.
Knowledge is your greatest ally here, %PLAYERNAME%. So go out there and find it!
%PLAYERNAME%... you did it! I have to say, watching you out there had me on the edge of my seat.
You’re now partnered with one of the most remarkable Pokémon I have ever researched.
But the work doesn’t stop here - if anything, this is where the most exciting part begins.
Take the time to really understand Mega Evolved Mewtwo -  its moves, its strengths.
Don’t rush.  Learn alongside your new partner, and let that understanding grow naturally.
I have a feeling the two of you are going to do some incredible things together.
%PLAYERNAME%,  stop for just a moment and take stock of what you’ve achieved here.
From our very first conversation about Mewtwo’s origins to standing here with Mega Mewtwo as your partner.
This reminds me of why I chose to become a Professor. The wonder of it never gets old.
But beyond all the data and discoveries, I am genuinely proud of you, %PLAYERNAME%.
The world of Pokémon is vast and full of discoveries that neither of us have even dreamed of. Today you proved you have everything it takes to meet whatever comes next.
Now go celebrate! You and Mega Mewtwo have both earned it!
The moment has arrived, %PLAYERNAME%, and there is one final decision standing between you and Mega Mewtwo.
You see, Mega Evolved Mewtwo has two distinct forms, each fascinating in its own right.
Mega Mewtwo X has a grip strength of one ton and can sprint a hundred meters in two seconds flat!
Despite the diminished size of Mega Mewtwo Y, its mental power has grown phenomenally.
Both forms are a proof to what Mega Evolution can unlock in an already powerful Pokémon.
There’s no wrong path here, %PLAYERNAME%. Trust your judgement and go show Mega Mewtwo what you’re made of!
A bold choice, %PLAYERNAME%! Mega Mewtwo X is a Psychic and Fighting type - prepare for a relentless battle.
Stay focused and be prepared for its overwhelming physical power.
A wise choice, %PLAYERNAME%! Mega Mewtwo Y is a Psychic type - its mental power will be your greatest challenge.
Keep sharp. Strategy will be key to overcoming its immense psychic strength.
Alright, %PLAYERNAME%, listen up. Things are about to pop off!
You know how some Trainers are just good, and then some Trainers are, like, REALLY good? We’re about to find out which one you are!

There are four challenges in different areas of the city just waiting for you to tackle them. The areas are called City Districts, and the challenges for Trainers are called—get this—Trainer Challenges.
Each challenge tests something totally different, so follow your instinct and go after the ones that excite you. You just need to complete two, but you can do more!
Let’s see what you’ve got, %PLAYERNAME%! Those challenges are shaking in their boots!
Okay %PLAYERNAME%, I need you to take a breath because we’re about to get to the GOOD part!
You brought your whole self to those challenges, and now here we are. One step away from an extra-special challenge!
Get out there and show me what you’ve got!
You know, I had a hunch you’d go that way, and I’ve learned to never doubt my hunches.
I also have no doubt that you and Mewtwo are going to make a mega-powerful duo.
You’ve earned this moment, %PLAYERNAME%. Every challenge, every step, and every decision brought you right here.
Now get out there and make it LEGENDARY!
Well hello there, you Pokémon expert you!
This proves you’re ready for, drumroll please, Mewtwo and its Mega Evolutions! You heard me right—that overachiever has MULTIPLE Mega Evolutions: Mega Mewtwo X and Mega Mewtwo Y.
Both are incredibly powerful, and both are absolutely awesome!
So tell me, %PLAYERNAME%. Which form are you feeling? Trust those instincts!
%PLAYERNAME%. I’m glad you’re here. What lies ahead is not a simple task.
It’s an opportunity to demonstrate that you possess the full breadth of skills that a true expert Trainer requires.
You will find a series of four challenges located in different areas of the city. Each of these Trainer Challenges is designed to test an essential competency.
I have assessed these City Districts and their challenges carefully. You will need to complete at least two.
I advise against approaching this carelessly. Each challenge demands focus and intentionality.
When you are ready, %PLAYERNAME%, you may begin. I will be watching your progress with great interest.
You’ve done what was required, and you’ve done it well.
Every challenge you completed was designed to test a specific dimension of what it truly means to be a capable Trainer.
You have proven yourself, and now it’s time for the final step.
One last challenge remains. I’m convinced you are ready for it.
A thoughtful choice. I admit that I had my own hypothesis about which you would select.
I can tell you this with confidence: You and Mewtwo are well matched.
The potential for something truly extraordinary between a Trainer of your talent and a Pokémon of that power is not insignificant.
Go on, %PLAYERNAME%. I am most interested to see what you accomplish together.
Now that you have proven yourself a true expert, I have information to share about Mewtwo and Mega Evolution.
Mewtwo is a Pokémon of extraordinary power, and only a Trainer of your caliber is equipped to handle it.
It has two Mega Evolutions: Mega Mewtwo X and Mega Mewtwo Y.
I will ask you once, and I expect you to consider carefully. Which form do you wish to encounter?
You finished the Collection District challenge! Look at you go!
There are SO many different Pokémon out there, and you just went and found them like it was nothing. And it was NOT nothing!
Every Pokémon you collect is a new connection—a new buddy who’s part of your journey.
You’ve got a gift for this, %PLAYERNAME%. Congrats!
The Collection District challenge is complete.
To collect is not merely to accumulate.
A Trainer who seeks out different Pokémon and strives to understand what makes each one unique shows they are genuinely engaged with the world around them.
You approached this challenge with that understanding, %PLAYERNAME%, and it shows. Congratulations.
The Collection District challenge is done!
There’s something I really admire about a Trainer who seeks out different Pokémon and wants to understand what makes each one special.
Every great Trainer I’ve ever met had fire AND curiosity driving them on.
Today you showed me you’ve got both, %PLAYERNAME%. Congratulations!
%PLAYERNAME%! Good, you’re here. I’ve got something big lined up, and I need someone who can handle it!
This isn’t just any mission. This is your shot to prove you’re the real deal. A bona fide Pokémon expert.
The city is divided into four areas, called City Districts, and there are challenges waiting for you in all of ’em.
Each Trainer Challenge is designed to test a different skill. You’ll need to complete at least two, so pick the ones that fire you up and go all in!
No holding back. I want to see everything you’ve got out there!
Show me what you’re made of, %PLAYERNAME%. Let’s GO!
Look at you, %PLAYERNAME%! You’ve really brought the heat!
Those challenges weren’t easy, but you took them on anyway and came out stronger for it.
That’s exactly the kind of Trainer I knew you were!
Now it's time to get ready for the final step. Everything you worked for is waiting—now go get it!
Ha. Good choice, %PLAYERNAME%. I respect it!
That’s exactly the kind of decision-making I’d expect from an expert Trainer.
Whatever lies ahead, I have no doubt that you and Mewtwo are going to bring out the best in each other.
This is the moment, %PLAYERNAME%. Go show the world what you’re made of. I'll be cheering you on every step of the way!
I knew it—an expert through and through! Hard-won and well deserved.
But here’s where things get really exciting. Now you're ready for Mewtwo and its Mega Evolutions!
That’s right, Mewtwo has two Mega Evolutions: Mega Mewtwo X and Mega Mewtwo Y. Each one is powerful in its own right.
So tell me, %PLAYERNAME%. Which form are you gonna face?
Choose wisely, and choose with confidence!
You finished the Friendship District challenge! Look at you go!
Connections are everything as a Trainer. Bonds with the people around you, your Pokémon, and the whole community out there.
A Trainer with a big heart is unstoppable.
From what I saw today, %PLAYERNAME%, your heart is as big as they come.
The Friendship District challenge is complete.
The data is clear: Trainers who forge meaningful connections—with other people and with their Pokémon—consistently perform at a higher level.
Trust and bonds matter. That’s just science.
